query_text: Plan a 3-day trip for 2 people from Washington to Greensboro from November 19th to November 21st, 2024, with a budget of $1,650. Include activities related to concerts and shows.

properties.description: Built in 1927, the historic Carolina Theatre proudly welcomes audiences to downtown Greensboro to experience the rich atmosphere and ambiance of another era, while enjoying classic movies, live performances and concerts, and so much more! (Admission fee for most events.)

Hops Burger Bar
properties.description: Hops Burger Bar is an elite craft burger and craft beer joint in Greensboro, NC. We serve only Certified Angus Beef Brand meat and the highest quality produce, fish, and dairy. Ten of our seventeen taps rotate keg for keg with only the finest highly allocated artisanal beverages. We buy local and support local whenever possible. Come and join us!

properties.name: Green Valley Grill
properties.description: Celebrating our 25th Anniversary! Enjoy informally elegant fine dining and seasonal food using Old-World European culinary sensibilities and flavors. Our wine list receives the Wine Spectator Award of Excellence each year and features over 75 wines by the glass. The freshest food prepared by a passionate team, and served by friendly and competent people, is a recipe for a great dining experience. When you add eclectic decor and dining alfresco in our Courtyard, you will imagine that you have traveled farther than you did. We welcome you to dine with us seven days a week for breakfast, lunch, dinner and weekend brunch. Adjacent to the O.Henry Hotel.

properties.name: Print Works Bistro
properties.description: Great News!!! PWB Rated Top 100 in USA for a Date Night and Outdoor Dining! Breakfast, Brunch 7 Days, and Dinner. Print Works Bistro, employee-owned and located adjacent to Proximity Hotel, features classical and modern versions of French bistro dishes created with locally sourced food. Menus change frequently with the seasons. There are more than 75 wines by the glass selections from the Wine Spectator Award of Excellence list and a seasonal craft cocktail list. Each seat in the dining room offers views of lush gardens and natural surroundings with floor-to-ceiling windows offering lots of natural light. Enjoy outdoor dining (with cozy lap blankets) on the creekside Terrace. Fine dining but casual dress. Reserve a table at printworksbistro.com.

properties.name: Lucky 32 Southern Kitchen
properties.description: Discover American Southern Cuisine at our Greensboro restaurant, served in an upscale but casual environment. Dine al fresco with cozy lap blankets on the Veranda. We use the highest quality ingredients (including a lot of local food) to create our interpretation of classic Southern dishes. Off Wendover Ave on Westover Terrace and close to Friendly Center.

properties.localName: Crafted The Art of the Taco
properties.name: Crafted The Art of the Taco
properties.description: NOT a Mexican restaurant.....this is a serious TACO JOINT.  You will not find authentic Mexican here.....only creative gourmet tacos. A FRESH experience for your tastebuds.

properties.name: Sarah's Kabob Shop
properties.description: Free standing building , next to Fast Med Urgent Care and across from Best Diner. Large parking lot with outside sitting area and two private rooms for special occasions.

properties.description: Welcome to At Elm St. Grill: Where Culinary Diversity Meets Unmatched Comfort! At Elm St. Grill, we’re more than just a dining spot; we’re a culinary destination where diverse flavors, a welcoming atmosphere, and exceptional service come together to craft unforgettable experiences. Our menu is a celebration of variety, featuring everything from the comforting warmth of Chicken Tikka Masala and Penne alla Vodka to the bold tastes of Sushi-grade Ahi Tuna and Certified Angus Beef steaks. With options designed to satisfy every palate, you’re sure to find something perfect for you. Enhance your meal with a selection from our curated list of wines, craft beers, and handcrafted cocktails. Discover the magic of At Elm St. Grill today—we can’t wait to welcome you and make your dining experience truly memorable!
